agentStop.bash: VALIDATOR=".akr/templates/.akr/scripts/validate_documentation.py"; if [ ! -f "$VALIDATOR" ]; then echo '{"summary": {"note": "validate_documentation.py not found — run git submodule update --init --recursive to initialise .akr/templates"}}'; exit 0; fi; if [ ! -f modules.yaml ]; then echo '{"summary": {"note": "modules.yaml not found — skipping module-aware validation"}}'; exit 0; fi; mkdir -p .akr/logs; CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=AM HEAD -- 'docs/**/*.md' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then python "$VALIDATOR" --changed-files "$CHANGED_FILES" --output json --fail-on needs 2>&1 | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; else python "$VALIDATOR" --file docs/modules --output json --fail-on needs 2>&1 | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; fi
